title: Puffy Crunchy French Parma Ham Mille Feuille
description: A fatty and crunchy French dish featuring parma ham, candy, and puff pastry, suitable for a Buddhist temple gathering.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a large rectangle.
Spread the butter evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Arrange the parma ham slices on one half of the pastry, leaving a small border around the edges.
Sprinkle the candy over the parma ham.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the egg over the pastry to glaze.
Sprinkle the confectioners sugar over the pastry.
Cut the pastry into small rectangles.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
